subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Divine Call in the Persian tongue, that thou mayest comprehend its meanings and partake of the pure wine of inner significances concealed therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندای الهی را بلسان پارسی بشنو تا بمعانی آن پی بری و از رحیق معانی که در او مستور
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
